TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski, title = Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pedro_Pablo_Kuczynski} }

S.FORM: Pedro Pablo Kuczynski I 1938 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Peru anini i ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: p…ô…¨~…ģro~u pab~b~v…ĺo~u ko~u~u ¶*jnski i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i p…ô…¨~…ģro~u pab~b~v…ĺo~u ko~u~u ¶*jnski, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u p…ôro~u~u anini i ¶i p…ô…¨~…ģro~u pab~b~v…ĺo~u ko~u~u ¶*jnski, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Pedro Pablo Kuczynski I 1938 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Peru anini i ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad.
